name.en: Fist the Contractor of the Imprisoned Dragon
name.ja: <ruby>獄<rt>ごく</rt></ruby><ruby>竜<rt>りゅう</rt></ruby>の<ruby>契<rt>けい</rt></ruby><ruby>約<rt>やく</rt></ruby><ruby>者<rt>しゃ</rt></ruby> フィスト

requirement.en: During your Main Phase that you Fusion Summoned this card, shuffle 2 monsters from your Graveyard into the Deck.

effect.en: Destroy 1 monster on your opponent's field. Then, you can destroy 1 WATER Attribute Magical Knight or Machine Type monster on your opponent's field.

materials.en: "Fist the Star Protector's Roaring Gauntlet" + 1 Level 8 or lower WATER Attribute Effect Monster
